title: 20 More winners Cycle Trading Signal 🔥 app 🔥 Math don't lie 🔥 and again 20 is the limit here can't post more.
author: Patient-Knowledge915

comments.author: user_alpha231
comments.body: Signals look clean, but where’s the drawdown data?

replies.author: Patient-Knowledge915
replies.body: Regarding Drawdown: I am currently finalizing the proper math and historical calculations for drawdown data. Because a 5% move on a $40 asset is mathematically different than on a $200 asset, the final version will include a risk-adjustment model. For now, execution and risk management (position sizing) remain at the trader’s discretion. I will update the drawdown stats once the backtesting phase is complete."
